subcodes.first_line: How many were the servants who awaited My days, yet when the appointed time was come, denied the Lord of Names and Attributes! Say: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کم من عباد انتظروا ایامی فلما اتی المیقات کفروا بمالک الاسماء و الصفات قل یا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
